Volunteer - Logistics Coordination Job at Nigerian Marine Environment Protection Association (NIMEPA)




        
    

        
        At The Nigerian Marine Environment Protection Association (NIMEPA), we are committed to safeguarding our oceans and marine ecosystems for future generations. Through conservation, advocacy, collaborations, research, and sustainable practices, we work to protect marine life, reduce pollution, and promote responsible ocean stewardship.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Volunteer - Logistics Coordination

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Contract

Qualification


	Interested candidates(s) should possess relevant qualifications and experience
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Inventory Data & Warehouse Officer",
  "description": "Custom Gifts &amp; Designs Limited is Nigeria&#39;s premier destination for gifting services -integrating flower shop, gift store, kiddies giftware, party favors, and a balloon shop.


Custom Gifts &amp; Designs brand is recognized as a leading departmental gift store in Nigeria, offering a diverse range of gifting services and products. We strive to provide exceptional experiences for our customers, making us a preferred destination for all gifting needs in Nigeria and beyond.



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Data &amp; Warehouse Officer

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time



Job Summary


	We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Inventory Data &amp; Warehouse Officer to support inventory management, warehouse operations, and product data administration.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for maintaining accurate inventory records, creating products in the ERP/POS system, managing warehouse organization, and supporting stock control activities.


Key Responsibilities
Inventory Data Management:


	Create and maintain product records in the ERP/POS system
	Generate and manage product barcodes
	Categorize products accurately within the inventory system
	Update stock records and inventory transactions
	Ensure inventory database accuracy and completeness
	Monitor and correct inventory discrepancies


Warehouse Operations:


	Shelve and label products appropriately
	Organize warehouse storage locations for efficient operations
	Monitor stock movement and transfers
	Assist in periodic stock counts and inventory audits
	Retrieve products for internal departments when required
	Ensure proper warehouse arrangement and housekeeping standards
	Support inventory reconciliation activities


Requirements


	SSCE qualification
	0&ndash;2 years of experience in Inventory Management, Data Entry, Warehouse Operations, or Stock Control
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy
	Excellent organizational and record-keeping skills
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work independently and within a team
	Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities
	Ability to handle inventory data with a high level of accuracy


Technical Skills:


	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, Outlook)
	Experience using ERP, POS, or Inventory Management Systems
	Knowledge of barcode generation and inventory tracking processes
	Ability to prepare inventory and stock reports
	Good computer literacy and data management skills


Preferred Qualities:


	High level of attention to detail
	Strong integrity and accountability
	Ability to manage inventory records accurately
	Good time management skills
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines
	Proactive and results-oriented mindset.




Compensation &amp; Benefits


	?100,000 Monthly Salary
	Health Maintenance Organization (HMO)
	Performance-Based Bonus
	Staff Transportation Support
	Career Growth Opportunities
	Professional Work Environment.




Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to: cgdbrandmanager@gmail.com using &quot;Inventory Data &amp; Warehouse Officer&quot; as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-04",

    "@type": "Organization",

  },

Inventory Data & Warehouse Officer Job at Custom Gifts & Designs Limited




        
    

        
        Custom Gifts & Designs Limited is Nigeria's premier destination for gifting services -integrating flower shop, gift store, kiddies giftware, party favors, and a balloon shop.


Custom Gifts & Designs brand is recognized as a leading departmental gift store in Nigeria, offering a diverse range of gifting services and products. We strive to provide exceptional experiences for our customers, making us a preferred destination for all gifting needs in Nigeria and beyond.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    





We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Data & Warehouse Officer

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time



Job Summary


	We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Inventory Data & Warehouse Officer to support inventory management, warehouse operations, and product data administration.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for maintaining accurate inventory records, creating products in the ERP/POS system, managing warehouse organization, and supporting stock control activities.


Key Responsibilities
Inventory Data Management:


	Create and maintain product records in the ERP/POS system
	Generate and manage product barcodes
	Categorize products accurately within the inventory system
	Update stock records and inventory transactions
	Ensure inventory database accuracy and completeness
	Monitor and correct inventory discrepancies


Warehouse Operations:


	Shelve and label products appropriately
	Organize warehouse storage locations for efficient operations
	Monitor stock movement and transfers
	Assist in periodic stock counts and inventory audits
	Retrieve products for internal departments when required
	Ensure proper warehouse arrangement and housekeeping standards
	Support inventory reconciliation activities


Requirements


	SSCE qualification
	0–2 years of experience in Inventory Management, Data Entry, Warehouse Operations, or Stock Control
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy
	Excellent organizational and record-keeping skills
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work independently and within a team
	Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities
	Ability to handle inventory data with a high level of accuracy


Technical Skills:


	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, Outlook)
	Experience using ERP, POS, or Inventory Management Systems
	Knowledge of barcode generation and inventory tracking processes
	Ability to prepare inventory and stock reports
	Good computer literacy and data management skills


Preferred Qualities:


	High level of attention to detail
	Strong integrity and accountability
	Ability to manage inventory records accurately
	Good time management skills
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines
	Proactive and results-oriented mindset.




Compensation & Benefits


	?100,000 Monthly Salary
	Health Maintenance Organization (HMO)
	Performance-Based Bonus
	Staff Transportation Support
	Career Growth Opportunities
	Professional Work Environment.




Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to: [email protected] using "Inventory Data & Warehouse Officer" as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Procurement Assistant",
  "description": "Yaphi Tech Nigeria Limited is a leading lifestyle brand, essentially created to provide great quality products, from luxury wristwatches, bags, makeup, sneakers, home, and electronic appliances, at affordable prices.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Assistant

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical procurement assistant to support the company&#39;s procurement and supply chain operations.
	The ideal candidate will possess strong data management skills, excellent attention to detail, and the ability to work independently while adhering to company policies and procedures.


Job Requirements
Education:


	
	Bachelor&#39;s Degree or higher in Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, Procurement, Accounting, Economics, or a related field.
	


Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel, including data analysis, reporting, and spreadsheet management.
	Strong numerical and analytical skills with the ability to process and interpret large volumes of data accurately.
	Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to identify issues and implement effective solutions independently.
	Good organizational and time-management skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks efficiently.


Personal Attributes:


	Highly meticulous, detail-oriented, and committed to maintaining accuracy in all work processes.
	Strong sense of responsibility and professionalism.
	Ability to follow company policies, work procedures, and operational requirements effectively.
	Positive attitude, adaptability, and willingness to support business needs as assigned.


Compensation &amp; Benefits
Probation Period:


	Monthly salary: N200,000.
	Free accommodation provided during the 2-month probation period.


Confirmation of Employment:


	
	Upon successful completion of probation, salary will be reviewed and increased by 10%&ndash;20%, based on individual performance and contribution.
	


Annual Salary Review:


	Salaries are reviewed annually every March.
	Employees may receive a salary increase of 5%&ndash;10% based on overall performance during the preceding year.


Performance Bonus:


	
	Monthly performance-based bonus awarded according to individual performance and achievement of assigned targets.
	


Year-End Bonus:


	Year-end bonus equivalent to 1&ndash;3 months&#39; basic salary.
	Bonus amount is determined by annual KPI performance, overall contribution, and length of service with the company.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: mailseyi247@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Procurement Assistant Job at Yaphi Tech Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Yaphi Tech Nigeria Limited is a leading lifestyle brand, essentially created to provide great quality products, from luxury wristwatches, bags, makeup, sneakers, home, and electronic appliances, at affordable prices.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Assistant

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical procurement assistant to support the company's procurement and supply chain operations.
	The ideal candidate will possess strong data management skills, excellent attention to detail, and the ability to work independently while adhering to company policies and procedures.


Job Requirements
Education:


	
	Bachelor's Degree or higher in Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, Procurement, Accounting, Economics, or a related field.
	


Skills & Competencies:


	Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel, including data analysis, reporting, and spreadsheet management.
	Strong numerical and analytical skills with the ability to process and interpret large volumes of data accurately.
	Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to identify issues and implement effective solutions independently.
	Good organizational and time-management skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks efficiently.


Personal Attributes:


	Highly meticulous, detail-oriented, and committed to maintaining accuracy in all work processes.
	Strong sense of responsibility and professionalism.
	Ability to follow company policies, work procedures, and operational requirements effectively.
	Positive attitude, adaptability, and willingness to support business needs as assigned.


Compensation & Benefits
Probation Period:


	Monthly salary: N200,000.
	Free accommodation provided during the 2-month probation period.


Confirmation of Employment:


	
	Upon successful completion of probation, salary will be reviewed and increased by 10%–20%, based on individual performance and contribution.
	


Annual Salary Review:


	Salaries are reviewed annually every March.
	Employees may receive a salary increase of 5%–10% based on overall performance during the preceding year.


Performance Bonus:


	
	Monthly performance-based bonus awarded according to individual performance and achievement of assigned targets.
	


Year-End Bonus:


	Year-end bonus equivalent to 1–3 months' basic salary.
	Bonus amount is determined by annual KPI performance, overall contribution, and length of service with the company.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Front Office Manager",
  "description": "Christian Retreat Centre offers a serene &amp; spiritual atmosphere for retreats &amp; other Christian events.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Office Manager

Job Location: Ikorodu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Guest/Visitor Services: Greeting visitors, managing check-ins/outs, providing information, handling complaints, ensuring a welcoming atmosphere.
	Communication: Answering, screening, and directing calls; managing emails and correspondence.
	Administrative Tasks: Scheduling appointments, maintaining records/files, handling mail/deliveries, managing office supplies, data entry, and using office equipment.
	Operational Duties: Managing reservations, processing payments, ensuring security protocols, and liaising with other departments (like housekeeping).
	Leadership Role: Directing the activities of other personnels


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor`s / Master`s Degree&nbsp;
	Must have 1 - 3 years of experience in hotel &amp; hospitality
	Strong leadership and management skills.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Problem-solving and conflict-resolution abilities.
	Organizational and multitasking skills.
	Proficiency in relevant software and technology.
	Knowledge of hospitality &amp;customer service principles.
	Must reside in Ikorodu
	Must be a christian.


Salary
N140,000 - N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their resume and cover letter to: adamng2016@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Front Office Manager Job at Christian Retreat Centre




        
    

        
        Christian Retreat Centre offers a serene & spiritual atmosphere for retreats & other Christian events.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Office Manager

Job Location: Ikorodu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Guest/Visitor Services: Greeting visitors, managing check-ins/outs, providing information, handling complaints, ensuring a welcoming atmosphere.
	Communication: Answering, screening, and directing calls; managing emails and correspondence.
	Administrative Tasks: Scheduling appointments, maintaining records/files, handling mail/deliveries, managing office supplies, data entry, and using office equipment.
	Operational Duties: Managing reservations, processing payments, ensuring security protocols, and liaising with other departments (like housekeeping).
	Leadership Role: Directing the activities of other personnels


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor`s / Master`s Degree 
	Must have 1 - 3 years of experience in hotel & hospitality
	Strong leadership and management skills.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Problem-solving and conflict-resolution abilities.
	Organizational and multitasking skills.
	Proficiency in relevant software and technology.
	Knowledge of hospitality &customer service principles.
	Must reside in Ikorodu
	Must be a christian.


Salary
N140,000 - N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their resume and cover letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
